results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook | IMF
2026 Market Outlook | J.P. Morgan Global Research

summary: Middle East conflict (Strait of Hormuz risk), U.S. intervention in Venezuela, NATO posture in Greenland, ongoing tariff uncertainty, and potential energy crisis are key risks. IMF forecasts global growth at 3.1% and inflation at 4.4% for 2026. Semiconductor supply chains and critical minerals are geostrategically contested.
